name: Naver Pay Korea Digital Payment API
what_it_does: Naver Pay Korea digital payment REST API for Korean e-commerce merchants, Naver Smart Store sellers, and service providers to accept payments from Naver Pay's 30M+ Korean users using saved cards, bank accounts, and Naver Pay points through Naver's dominant Korean search and commerce ecosystem, enabling both Naver-integrated checkout and external merchant checkout with subscription billing and point integration. Enables AI agents to manage Naver Pay checkout for Korean online payment automation, handle payment confirmation for Naver Pay transaction verification automation, access Naver Pay recurring for subscription billing automation, retrieve Naver Pay points for reward redemption automation, manage payment cancellation for Korean order reversal automation, handle settlement inquiry for merchant reconciliation automation, access payment button for Naver Pay UX integration automation, retrieve transaction status for payment monitoring automation, manage virtual account for Korean B2B invoice payment automation, and integrate Naver Pay with Naver Smart Store, external Korean e-commerce, and subscription services for end-to-end Korean digital payment automation.
use_cases: Accepting Naver Pay checkout from 30M+ Korean consumers for e-commerce automation agents
Processing Naver Pay subscription billing for Korean SaaS and media platform agents
Integrating Naver Pay points redemption for Naver shopping ecosystem automation agents
Receiving Naver Pay webhook confirmation for Korean marketplace order fulfillment agents
not_for: Non-Korean markets (Naver Pay is Korea-only KRW platform)
Cross-border international payments (Naver Pay is domestic Korean payment only)
Merchants not using Korean Naver ecosystem (Naver Pay is most valuable within Naver platforms)
best_when: A Korean e-commerce merchant or Naver Smart Store seller wanting AI agents to accept payments from Naver Pay's 30M+ Korean users through Naver's payment API with points integration.
avoid_when: NAVER DEVELOPER ACCOUNT REQUIRED: Naver Pay API requires Naver Developer Center registration with Korean business verification; automated foreign company Naver Pay integration without Korean entity creates eligibility failure. PAYMENT IS REDIRECT TO NAVER: Naver Pay checkout redirects consumer to Naver-hosted payment page; automated inline payment form assumption creates integration failure; automated checkout must implement redirect flow. POINTS AND CASH CAN BE MIXED: Naver Pay payment can combine points + card; automated single-payment-method assumption creates incomplete payment flow; automated must handle mixed-payment confirmation. KOREAN FSC REGULATIONS APPLY: Naver Pay is regulated by Financial Services Commission Korea; automated high-value transaction without KYC creates transaction limit; automated must comply with Korean e-money regulations.

auth.notes: Naver Pay uses merchant client_id + client_secret for API authentication. REST API with JSON. Seongnam, Korea HQ (Naver Corp). Founded 2015 (Naver Pay launch). KOSPI: 035420 (Naver Corp). Products: Online checkout, Smart Store integration, subscription, Naver Pay points, virtual account. SDKs: None public. FSC-regulated. 30M+ Korean users. Korea's #2 digital payment (behind KakaoPay). Integrated with Naver search and shopping ecosystem. Competes with KakaoPay and Toss for Korean digital payments.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox via Naver Developer Center free; production requires Korean merchant approval
pricing.paid_tiers: Transaction fee negotiated: typically 2-3% per transaction; Smart Store merchants get preferential rates
pricing.notes: Seongnam KR. Naver Corp (KOSPI:035420). FSC regulated. Transaction fee model. KRW only.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per merchant client_id; payment and settlement APIs throttled; webhooks for payment events

known_agent_gotchas: REDIRECT FLOW REQUIRED FOR CHECKOUT: Naver Pay checkout redirects consumer to Naver-hosted payment page; automated inline card form assumption creates broken integration; automated checkout must use return_url and redirect consumer to Naver Pay URL

MIXED PAYMENT POINTS+CARD: Naver Pay payment can combine points and card; automated single-payment-method confirmation creates incomplete payment tracking; automated must handle total_amount split between points and payment method

KOREAN BUSINESS VERIFICATION REQUIRED: Naver Pay merchant registration requires Korean business entity verification; automated foreign company Naver Pay integration creates eligibility failure at developer center registration

DOCUMENTATION IS IN KOREAN: Naver Pay developer documentation is primarily in Korean; automated integration by non-Korean readers requires translation; automated integration benefits from Korean developer or bilingual documentation access

PAYMENT APPROVAL REQUIRES TWO-STEP: Naver Pay checkout has reserve (준비) and approval (승인) two-step flow; automated single-call payment assumption creates incomplete payment; automated must call reserve, redirect, then call approval after return
agent_readiness.security_notes: Korea digital payment. FSC regulated. PIPA. Client ID/secret. KR. Payment and user data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Korea digital payment. FSC, PIPA. API credentials. KR. Payment and user identity data.
